name: samba-libs
title: samba-libs
description:
Samba core libraries
Samba is an implementation of the SMB/CIFS protocol for Unix systems,
providing support for cross-platform file sharing with Microsoft Windows, OS X,
and other Unix systems.  Samba can also function as a domain controller
or member server in Active Directory or NT4-style domains.
.
This package contains the shared libraries.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use samba-libs because Samba core libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use samba-libs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair samba-libs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `samba-libs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
